nasb.text: I will bring upon Elam the four winds From the four ends of heaven, And will scatter them to all these winds; And there will be no nation To which the outcasts of Elam will not go.

esv.text: And I will bring upon Elam the four winds from the four quarters of heaven. And I will scatter them to all those winds, and there shall be no nation to which those driven out of Elam shall not come.

cnv.text: 我要使四風從天的四邊颳到以攔身上， 把他們分散到四方， 以致沒有一個國家沒有以攔難民的蹤跡。

ccb.text: 我要使敌人从四面八方如风而来，把以拦人驱散到四方，使他们流落到列国。
